valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Fri 19 Jun 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Sat 20 Jun 2026
general_synopsis: Low Fair Isle 1000 expected 350 miles north of Faeroes 988 by midday tomorrow. Low northwest Bailey 1005 losing its identity
